result:
1	---
     2	name: qjudge-exam-grading-sop
     3	description: Open-ended 題目 AI 批改 SOP(YAML)。
     4	---
     5	
     6	```yaml
     7	sop:
     8	  purpose: "Open-ended AI 批改:訂 rubric + seed grade.csv → 一題一題評 → 寫回。"
     9	
    10	  artifacts:
    11	    rubric.md:
    12	      writer: artifact_write
    13	      content_type: text/markdown
    14	
    15	    grade.csv:
    16	      seeder:   artifact_csv_from_json   # Stage 2 建檔
    17	      searcher: artifact_csv_search       # Stage 3/5 狀態檢查(不帶 rows)
    18	      loader:   artifact_csv_to_json      # Stage 3/5 取批次 payload
    19	      patcher:  artifact_csv_patch        # Stage 3/5 寫回部分變動
    20	      columns: [index, exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback, score, reason, synced]
    21	      key_column: exam_answer_id
    22	
    23	  note: >
    24	    artifact 工具的 step 參數為 optional，正常流程省略即可；
    25	    工具會自動依 filename 定位唯一 artifact。僅在同 session 出現同名檔案時才需帶 step 消歧義。
    26	
    27	  stages:
    28	    - id: 1_target
    29	      out: context [contest_id, grading_question_id]
    30	      on_missing: 逐項問 user。
    31	
    32	    - id: 2_seed
    33	      steps:
    34	        - |
    35	          # 1. 產 rubric.md
    36	          artifact_write(
    37	            filename="rubric.md",
    38	            content=<markdown 評分標準>,
    39	            content_type="text/markdown",
    40	          )
    41	        - |
    42	          # 2. 抓答案
    43	          response = qjudge_grading(
    44	            action="list_answers",
    45	            contest_id=<X>, question_id=<Y>,
    46	            projection="grading",
    47	          )
    48	          # response 形狀: {"count": N, "items": [{exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback}, ...]}
    49	        - |
    50	          # 3. seed grade.csv（records 帶 index + 5 欄，defaults 補 score/reason/synced = 9 欄）
    51	          artifact_csv_from_json(
    52	            filename="grade.csv",
    53	            records=response["items"],
    54	            defaults={"score": "", "reason": "", "synced": ""},
    55	          )
    56	        - |
    57	          # 4. 宣告批次計畫（每 20 筆一個 todo）
    58	          write_todos(todos=[
    59	            {"content": "批改 index 1-20 依 rubric.md",  "status": "pending"},
    60	            {"content": "批改 index 21-40 依 rubric.md", "status": "pending"},
    61	            ...
    62	          ])
    63	      out: [rubric.md, grade.csv (score/reason/synced 都空), todo list]
    64	
    65	    - id: 3_grade_batch_of_20
    66	      rules:
    67	        - 一題一題依 rubric.md 決定 score 與 reason，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
    68	        - 禁止 artifact_read + offset/limit 手動找未評列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search / artifact_csv_to_json。
    69	        - reason 政策（省 output token）：
    70	            - 預設：滿分（rubric 最高分） → reason 留空；非滿分 → 必填 reason。
    71	            - 例外：滿分但有值得給的改進建議 → 可填。
    72	            - 覆寫：若 user 在 Stage 1 明說「每題都要寫 reason / 都要評語」 → 一律填。
    73	      loop:
    74	        - |
    75	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒評（便宜、不拉 rows）
    76	          status = artifact_csv_search(
    77	            filename="grade.csv",
    78	            where={"score": ""},
    79	          )
    80	          # status = {"matched": M, "total_rows": N}
    81	          # matched == 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
    82	        - |
    83	          # 2. 取本批 20 筆 + 必要兩欄（其他欄/列不載入，省 token）
    84	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
    85	            filename="grade.csv",
    86	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "answer_text"],
    87	            where={"score": ""},
    88	            limit=20,
    89	          )
    90	          # batch["records"] = [{exam_answer_id, answer_text}, ...]
    91	        - |
    92	          # 3. 對每一筆獨立思考後決定 score 與 reason（依 reason 政策）
    93	        - |
    94	          # 4. 寫回本批變動
    95	          artifact_csv_patch(
    96	            filename="grade.csv",
    97	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
    98	            updates=[
    99	              {"exam_answer_id": ..., "score": "...", "reason": "..."},
   100	              ... (本批 20 筆)
   101	            ],
   102	          )
   103	        - |
   104	          # 5. 更新 todo: 本批 completed，下一批 pending → in_progress
   105	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   106	        - status.matched > 0 → 下一輪；== 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
   107	
   108	    - id: 4_writeback_confirm
   109	      halt: true
   110	      precondition: |
   111	        artifact_csv_search(filename="grade.csv", where={"score": ""}) 回 matched == 0
   112	        （仍有空值 → 回 3_grade_batch_of_20 補完再進這裡）
   113	      branches:
   114	        contains_writeback_keyword: goto 5_writeback
   115	        other:                      ask_again (要「寫回」)
   116	      first_entry_message: |
   117	        全部 <N> 筆已評完（右側 panel 看 grade.csv）。
   118	        - 確認寫回 → 回「確認寫回」
   119	        - 取消 → 回「取消」
   120	
   121	    - id: 5_writeback
   122	      rules:
   123	        - 禁止手動解析 CSV 或寫 Python。search 看狀態 → to_json 組 payload → batch_grade → patch 標 synced。
   124	        - 每批最多 20 筆（跟 Stage 3 批次對齊）。
   125	        - 批次計畫前/每批完成後必 write_todos（跟 Stage 3 同規則）。
   126	      loop:
   127	        - |
   128	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒 sync
   129	          status = artifact_csv_search(
   130	            filename="grade.csv",
   131	            where={"synced": ""},
   132	          )
   133	          # matched == 0 → 跳出 loop 進 report
   134	        - |
   135	          # 2. 取這批 MCP payload（三欄）
   136	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
   137	            filename="grade.csv",
   138	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "score", "reason"],
   139	            where={"synced": ""},
   140	            limit=20,
   141	          )
   142	        - |
   143	          # 3. 整批寫回
   144	          qjudge_grading(action="batch_grade", grades=batch["records"])
   145	        - |
   146	          # 4. 成功的列標 synced="yes"；失敗的留空，等下輪重試或進 report
   147	          artifact_csv_patch(
   148	            filename="grade.csv",
   149	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
   150	            updates=[{"exam_answer_id": ..., "synced": "yes"}, ...],  # 只放成功的
   151	          )
   152	        - |
   153	          # 5. 更新 todo
   154	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   155	      report: 寫回 X 筆成功、Y 筆失敗（失敗列 exam_answer_id + 錯誤）。
   156	      idempotency: 同一 exam_answer_id 重複視為 no-op；synced=="yes" 的 row 下輪會自動被 where filter 跳過。
   157	
   158	  stage_resolution:
   159	    primary: artifact_list + artifact_csv_search
   160	    secondary: last_assistant_message
   161	    fallback: ask_user
   162	    map:
   163	      - {artifacts: [],                                    candidates: [1_target, 2_seed]}
   164	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty>0: stage: 3_grade_batch_of_20}
   165	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty=0: candidates: [4_writeback_confirm, 5_writeback]}
   166	
   167	  hard_rules:
   168	    - MCP 解析 / CSV 組裝必須在同一 turn 內自己做，禁 delegate task/subagent。
   169	    - 評分時一題一題思考並填 score，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
   170	    - 任何批次操作「前」都要 write_todos 宣告批次計畫；「每批完成後」立刻 write_todos 把該批標 completed；todo 未更新 = 不可進下一批。
   171	    - 禁止用 artifact_read + offset/limit 找未評/未 sync 列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search（狀態）或 artifact_csv_to_json（取 rows）。
   172	    - 寫回前 user 訊息必須含「寫回」兩字。
   173	```

逐批讀取空白作答並依 rubric 評分
批次更新 grade.csv 並確認無空白 score

input_data.content:
# 評分準則

## 題目
What is the difference between a mode switch and a context switch?

## 滿分：2 分

### 2 分
- 明確區分兩者：
  - **mode switch**：CPU 執行模式／權限層級切換，例如 user mode ↔ kernel mode，常由 trap / system call 觸發。
  - **context switch**：在不同 process / thread 之間切換，需保存目前執行上下文並載入另一個行程／執行緒的上下文。

### 1 分
- 只正確說明其中一項，或兩者都有提到但描述不完整、略有混淆。

### 0 分
- 內容明顯錯誤、完全未回答，或把兩者混為同一件事。

## 批改原則
- 以是否分清「權限模式切換」與「執行上下文切換」為核心。
- 若學生答案有等價說法，可給分。
- 語言簡潔但概念正確者可給滿分。

{"count": 20, "total_matched": 123, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "3924", "answer_text": "mode switch: 是指透過trap來做 priviledge mode 的切換，像是user to kernel mode；context switch 則是會儲存現在在執行process的資訊與相關狀態，並重起另一個process的"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3729", "answer_text": "Mode switch is a CPU change its mode (ex. from user mode to kernel mode). Context switch is a processor changing its currently running process to another."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4299", "answer_text": "mode switch: process切換不同的previlege，例如從user mode切換至kernel mode；context switch:複製整塊記憶體儲存當下process的資訊，restore 要處理的process(切換process)."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4959", "answer_text": "mode switch: a preocess swith to kernel mode from user mode. context switch: save a process and restore another one"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5152", "answer_text": "context switch是指正在執行中的process要換成另一個process去執行所需要做到的context轉換。mode switch是指從user mode換成privileged mode或是privileged mode換成user mode"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5273", "answer_text": "mode switch means a user-mode cause a trap and switch to kernel-mode, have os solve the trap. context switch means save a process's status and registers, and restore other process's status and registers."}, {"exam_answer_id": "6005", "answer_text": "mode switch: 在 user mode 或 kernel mode 之間切換，可以執行與使用的資源不同，資源的使用權也會從 user 切換為 OS (或相反)；context switch: 保留正在執行的 process 的工作狀態，lcoal variable 和 program counter 等等，接著將資源使用權交給其他 process。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4963", "answer_text": "Mode switch: CPU execution 透過 trap 或 system call 從一個 privilege level 轉換到另一個（e.g. User mode to Kernel mode)；context switch: 將一 process(thread) 的 context 儲存起來並 restore 回其他 process(thread) 的 context 的過程。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3833", "answer_text": "mode switch是權限的改變，像是process遇到trap或system call的時候，會從user mode轉成kernel mode去執行，context switch是process的轉換，會把原本的狀態先儲存，之後載入要換的process的狀態"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5931", "answer_text": "mode switch is to change cpu execution for one priority to another, eg. user->kernel mode. context switch is to save one process' execution and switch to that of another."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2399", "answer_text": "mode switch is about the operating mode, as the user mode and the kernel mode. context switch is about the switching of different process for operation."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5052", "answer_text": "mode swtich : switch between different privilege mode(e.g. move from user mode to kernel mode by trap) 2. context swtich : save the context of current process and restore the context of the next process. "}, {"exam_answer_id": "5342", "answer_text": "Mode switch is that user kernel use trap instruction to switch the mode to kernel mode. And context switch is that cpu save one process to PCB and restore other process."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4905", "answer_text": "Mode switch - switch bit on the cpu, that allows specific instructions to be executed (e.g. user mode -> kernel mode). Context switch - update cpu's state (registers, pc, etc.) when a process gets to be executed"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5281", "answer_text": "Mode: CPU switch Kernel  mode to User mode or User mode to Kernel mode; Context: store the process info and restore the another process info."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4943", "answer_text": "mode switch between user and kernel, context switch between all processes"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2784", "answer_text": "Mode switch is switching from kernel to user mode. Context switch is saving one process's context and storing it to load another one."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4710", "answer_text": "The mode switch occurs when the processors wants to change the level-execution mode (user-level mode to kernel mode Or kernel mode to user level mode). It uses software interruptions or sometimes systems calls. Context switch occurs when the dispatcher is asked by the scheduler to change the running process by another one. It leads to the save of the context information (PC, SP, ...) of the former running process"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4948", "answer_text": "mode switch 涉及 user mode 與 kernel mode 之間的切換，這會需要 system call 等等的機制處理，切換 mode 通常也會比較耗時。context switch 則不一定涉及 user and kernel mode 之間的轉換，不一定會有需要特權指令的時候。舉例來說，context switch 可能只在兩個不同的 user application process 之間切換。而像是如果 user-level process 需要 I/O 時就會因為需要特權指令而需要透過 mode switch 切換至 kernel mode"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4067", "answer_text": "mode switch is switch between user mode and kernel mode, while context switch 是切換執行的 process"}]}

兩者皆正確，並提到 trap / 儲存與還原 context
兩者皆正確，context switch 的狀態內容也有舉例

兩者方向正確，但說明偏簡略
context switch 大致正確，但 mode switch 描述偏離權限層級切換
概念正確但過於簡略，context switch 未完整說明
context switch 正確；mode switch 僅提 kernel→user，未完整區分
兩者皆正確，且有提到觸發機制與 context 內容
有正確區分 mode switch 與 context switch，且補充了例外情況

{"count": 20, "total_matched": 103, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "5270", "answer_text": "mode switch: changes the privilege level in the same process. context switch: changes running process by saved the old process's sate and storing the new one's."}, {"exam_answer_id": "6455", "answer_text": "mode switch是指切換CPU的執行模式(如User to Kernel)；context switch是指切換正在執行的process這個動作。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6120", "answer_text": "mode switch is to switch from kernel mode to user mode, which we'll often accompany system call or trap instruction. Context switch is to finish a process and restore a previous process."}, {"exam_answer_id": "3854", "answer_text": "mode:程序不用改 context:程序要改(cost大)"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2841", "answer_text": "Mode switch: change the CPU mode from one priviliege mode to another. {"count": 20, "total_matched": 23, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "4414", "answer_text": "(a) A mode switch is the process is switching from user to kernel mode or kernel to user mode based on the preveledges the process needed. (b) A context switch is CPU change a running process to ready state because another process has higher priority to execute compared to current process or current process exceeds its time allocated by the CPU, so the CPU stored its context and switch another process' context in."}, {"exam_answer_id": "6467", "answer_text": "Mode switch是權限的切換,例如將user模式切換到kernel模式。而context switch則是儲存正在執行中的程序state,再恢復另一程序的state。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6542", "answer_text": "mode switch：是指作業系統處理模型的切換，如使用者模式切換為核心模式。context switch是指Process與thread的切換行程。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4690", "answer_text": "mode switch: 把CPU execution mode從privilege level切到其他mode。 context switch: 儲存process的context，restore另一個process的context"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5807", "answer_text": "mode switch: switch between user mode and kernel mode. context switch: switch from a process to another process."}, {"exam_answer_id": "6560", "answer_text": "mode switch:可直接轉換模式，context switch ：當kernel要轉換時必須先藉由context switch from user to kernel"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4404", "answer_text": "一個是切換cpu模式，一個是save process execute context&restore that of another process"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4071", "answer_text": "mode switch: cpu changes from a priviledge to another,ex. user to kernel     context switch: save where the process is executing and recall where another process has executed and  executing"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6436", "answer_text": "mode switch change mode like from user mode to kernel mode. context switch save the executing process context and restore another prcoess context."}, {"exam_answer_id": "3966", "answer_text": "mode switch occurs when user execute trap the cpu mode will change from user mode to kernel mode. context switch is to store current context and change to next context."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4152", "answer_text": "A mode switch describe the switch between kernel mode and user mode. A context switch is a switch between processes, which must include mode switch."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4055", "answer_text": "mode switch是CPU中的權限等級轉換，而context switch為儲存process的執行狀態，並恢復下一個process的執行狀態"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4122", "answer_text": "mode switch 是他經過trap instruction 去切換到kernel mode去執行priviledge instruction, context switch  是將正在執行的process 的context 存起來，並載入新的process context"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2377", "answer_text": "Mode switch: Change execution mode from privelige mode to another one. eg. User mode to Kernel mode via trap or system call.     Context mode: Save the process's execution context, and resotore that of another process."}, {"exam_answer_id": "3769", "answer_text": "mode switch is the switch between user mode and kernel mode (vis trap instruction). context switch is to save the process executing context and restore that of the another process."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4241", "answer_text": "mode switch是指Trap呼叫system call從user mode切換到kernel mode； context switch是兩個process之間的資料交換，context switch較為麻煩"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6207", "answer_text": "1.Mode switch: CPU execution mode的切換，如user mode透過trap instruction進入kernel mode 2.context switch: 保留這個process的資料，並 restore another process的資料"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5096", "answer_text": "mode switch 是在user mode和kernel mode之間的轉換，而context switch 是不同process之間的轉換"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3825", "answer_text": "Model Switch is "}, {"exam_answer_id": "6123", "answer_text": "mode是OS切換控制權(user mode to kernel mode)，context是CPU要切換哪個process進入CPU運算"}]}
